name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 30 Sep 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.122"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Added a fallback email address field for Fastway shipping labels. If a shipped order doesn't include an email address, the fallback is used instead."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where a lower-case country code on a sales order caused the tax rate to be 0."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the eBay integration where weight in pounds was converted to kilograms when listing on the eBay Motors US site."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
